title: FastAPI Todo API
description: A backend REST API built with FastAPI that manages a task list. The application has validation issues, wrong HTTP response status codes, and incomplete query filtering features.

tasks.title: Fix Task Title Input Validation
tasks.description: Ensure the title of a task is required, cannot be empty or whitespaces only, and cannot exceed 100 characters. Return 422 Unprocessable Entity for invalid inputs.

tasks.title: Fix Status Update Handler
tasks.description: Updating a task's status (completed) currently crashes with a KeyError or Server Error due to referencing the wrong key in the mock database structure. Fix this logic in the PUT endpoint.

tasks.title: Implement Completed Filter
tasks.description: Support filtering tasks by completion status in the list endpoint. `GET /tasks?completed=true` or `GET /tasks?completed=false` should return only matched tasks. If the parameter is not provided, return all.

tasks.title: Fix Deleting Non-Existent Tasks Error Response
tasks.description: When a client requests to delete a task that does not exist, the API currently throws an unhandled server error. Update it to return a clear 404 Not Found response.
